items.name: Truvelle
items.description:
The Bridal Courtyard are exclusive stockists of Truvelle in Scotland.

In 2013, designer Gaby Bayona founded the Truvelle brand from her apartment living room. Since then, this proud Vancouver-based label has become something truly special. Think romantic and modern, lightweight fabrics and fresh lines.
items.persona: The Truvelle bride is laid back and effortlessly cool — a confident woman who doesn't want to change her style for her wedding day.

items.name: Aesling
items.description:
The Bridal Courtyard are exclusive stockists of Aesling in Scotland.

The Aesling collection is full of sleek simplicity, with a focus on highlighting natural silhouettes and clean lines. Designs are intentionally crafted to be relevant and contemporary while sophisticated and timeless. The options to add custom pieces with sleeves, scarves and blouses means that each bride can truly create her own bespoke look.
items.persona: The Aesling bride is chic and uncomplicated. She loves simplicity with a quirk and unique edge.

items.name: LAUDAE
items.description:
The Bridal Courtyard are exclusive stockists of Laudae in Scotland.

Design and sustainability obsessed, Canadian-based Laudae create cool and sexy dresses to celebrate the person in them. With stretch linings, soft fabrics and secret support through boning, these gowns are created to make you look and feel your best.
items.persona: The Laudae bride is bold and babely — a spirited woman who is environmentally conscious.

items.name: Alyssa Kristin
items.description:
The Bridal Courtyard are exclusive stockists of Alyssa Kristin in Scotland.

Made with love in Chicago, the Alyssa Kristin collection is renowned for being considered and versatile. Soft structure, intended minimalism and stunning fabrics — each bride can choose to customise with splits, buttons, sleeve and skirt options, creating the gown that represents exactly who she is.
items.persona: The Alyssa Kristin bride is confident and fashion forward. She loves attention to detail and wants to wear her gown, her way.

items.name: Justin Alexander Signature
items.description: Justin Alexander Signature redefines luxury. This collection is filled with showmanship and unrivalled attention to detail. With its focus on opulence and drama, these gowns are designed for the modern bride seeking a wedding gown that expresses her lavish and on-trend sense of style.
items.persona: The Justin Alexander Signature bride is a confident, self-assured and elegant woman.

items.name: Blue Willow by Anne Barge
items.description:
The Bridal Courtyard are exclusive stockists of Anne Barge in the UK.

Anne Barge collections are inspired by the lasting allure of vintage glamour with timeless silhouettes, premier fabrics and refined details.
items.persona: The Blue Willow by Anne Barge bride is a modern woman with classic taste — discerning and elegant with a love of structured, clean tailoring.
